zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith於1245年出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith27歲，母親Mary Menteith21歲。他與Matilda Strathearn結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1288年被列為he was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288.。他去世於1309年7月16日在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年64歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith于1245年出生在苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith27岁，母亲Mary Menteith21岁。他与Matilda Strathearn结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1288年被列为he was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288.。他去世于1309年7月16日在英国苏格兰培爾享年64岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith was born in 1245, in Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, was 27 and his mother, Mary Menteith, was 21. He married Matilda Strathearn. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. In 1288, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as he was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288.. He died on 16 July 1309, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith est né en 1245, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Menteith, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Strathearn. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. En 1288, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est he was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288.. Il est décédé le 16 juillet 1309, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith 1245 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith 27 und seine Mutter Mary Menteith 21. Er hat Matilda Strathearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1288, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als he was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288. aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. Juli 1309 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith è nato il nel 1245 nel Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mary Menteith, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Strathearn. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1288, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come he was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288.. Morì il 16 luglio 1309, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteithが1245年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteithは27歳，母Mary Menteithは21歳であった。Matilda Strathearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1288年，43歳の時，職業はhe was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288.と記録されている。彼は1309年7月16日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで64歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith(이)가 1245년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Menteith(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Matilda Strathearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1288년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 he was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288.이었다. 그는 1309년 7월 16일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith nasceu em 1245, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Menteith, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Strathearn. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1288, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como he was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288.. Ele faleceu em 16 de julho de 1309, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith родился в 1245 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Menteith, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Strathearn. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1288 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии he was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288. Он умер 16 июля 1309 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith nació en 1245, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary Menteith, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Matilda Strathearn. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1288, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era he was appointed the sheriff of dumbarton in 1288.. Murió el 16 de julio de 1309, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Perthshire, Scotland.
